description_long: This is a medium-sized lizard with a long, slender tail and well-developed limbs, each ending in five splayed toes tipped with claws. Its skin is textured and appears rough, with a mottled pattern of earthy browns and greens that provide camouflage in natural environments. The head is angular with a pronounced jawline and visible ridges above the eyes, giving it a slightly prehistoric appearance. The body is robust, tapering into a long tail that curves gracefully, suggesting agility and speed. The lizard's posture is alert, with its head raised and limbs spread, as if ready to move quickly. Subtle color variations and scale patterns are visible across its back and limbs, enhancing its lifelike detail.
description: A medium-sized, mottled brown and green lizard with a long tail, rough textured skin, and splayed clawed toes. Its alert posture and detailed scales give it a lifelike, agile appearance.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full length of the lizard's body and tail, with all four limbs splayed outward and the head facing upward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lizard's angular head, raised posture, and the full extension of its tail behind the body.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view revealing the underside of the lizard, including the ventral surface of the limbs and tail, and the spread of the toes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the lizard's head profile, the curvature of the tail, and the limb positioning.
